search.query: | eventcount summarize=false index=* |dedup index | fields index

| makeresults | eval sourcetype="*,bitdefender-ip-feed,bitdefender-web-feed,bitdefender-file-feed" | makemv delim="," sourcetype | mvexpand sourcetype | eval sourcetype_display=if(sourcetype=="*", "All", sourcetype) | eval sourcetype_display=if(sourcetype=="bitdefender-ip-feed", "IP Feed", sourcetype_display) | eval sourcetype_display=if(sourcetype=="bitdefender-web-feed", "Web Feed", sourcetype_display) | eval sourcetype_display=if(sourcetype=="bitdefender-file-feed", "File Feed", sourcetype_display) | fields sourcetype, sourcetype_display

index="$index_name$" sourcetype="$source_type$" confidence>=$confidence_score$ severity>=$severity_score$ "*$ioc_value|s$*" | spath path=affected_countries{}.country output=countries | spath path=affected_industries{}.industry output=industries | spath path=tags{} output=tags | eval group_key=case( isnotnull(md5), md5, isnotnull(ip), ip, isnotnull(url), url ) | eval base_type=case( isnotnull(md5) OR isnotnull(sha1) OR isnotnull(sha256), "filehash", isnotnull(ip), "ip", isnotnull(url), "url" ) | stats values(md5) as md5 values(sha1) as sha1 values(sha256) as sha256 values(first_seen) AS First_seen values(severity) AS Severity values(confidence) AS Confidence values(tags) AS Tags values(countries) AS Affected_countries values(industries) AS Affected_industries values(actor_name) AS Actor values(threat_type) AS Threat_Type values(threat_family) AS Threat_Family min(_time) as _time by group_key base_type | eval ioc_type=case( base_type=="filehash", mvappend("md5","sha1","sha256"), base_type=="ip", "ip", base_type=="url", "url" ) | eval ioc_value=case( base_type=="filehash", mvappend(md5, sha1, sha256), base_type=="ip", group_key, base_type=="url", group_key ) | fields _time ioc_type ioc_value First_seen Severity Confidence Tags Affected_countries Affected_industries Actor Threat_Type Threat_Family
